calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-31-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: J. Murphy, Court Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840
Robert M. Sellards, Esq., for the Plaintiff Danny Ci You Tan and Kun Hong Tan.
Witness Alex Aceves sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by Defendant James Patock.
Does 1-20 dismissed in open Court. Counsel for Plaintiff ordered to file a dismissal with the Court.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 155 Capp Street, San Francisco, California 94110.

Damages $21,666.00
Holdover damages $13,999.00
Pre-judgment interest $0
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $504.00
For a Total Judgment of $36,169.00
Judgment signed in open court.

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Aug-31-2015 Assigned To Trial Court
